---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(jsonlite)

candidates <- c(
  file.path(getwd(), "data", "scripts.json"),
  "data/scripts.json"
)

ci <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(), error = function(e) NULL)
if (!is.null(ci) && nchar(ci) > 0) {
  candidates <- c(file.path(dirname(ci), "data", "scripts.json"), candidates)
}

scripts_path <- Find(file.exists, candidates)

if (is.null(scripts_path)) {
  stop(paste("No se encontró scripts.json. Directorio actual:", getwd()))
}

scripts      <- read_json(scripts_path)
scripts_json <- toJSON(scripts, auto_unbox = TRUE)
cat(sprintf('<script>const SCRIPTS_DATA = %s;</script>', scripts_json))
```

```{=html}
<div class="lecturas-layout">

  <!-- COLUMNA IZQUIERDA -->
  <div class="glass-intro">
    <h2 class="intro-title">Scripts y Proyectos</h2>
    <p class="intro-text">
      En esta sección encontrarás los scripts que he desarrollado o utilizado
      en mis investigaciones y proyectos académicos.
    </p>
    <p class="intro-text">
      Cada entrada incluye una descripción del script, su referencia y un
      enlace para descargarlo directamente.
    </p>
    <p class="intro-text">
      Los scripts están principalmente en R y Python, orientados al análisis
      de datos, bibliometría y visualización, tambien hay distintos proyectos que he realizado que no son códigos.
    </p>
    <div class="tag-chips-wrap" id="scripts-tags"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- COLUMNA DERECHA -->
  <div class="lecturas-cards" id="scripts-cards"></div>

</div>

<div class="pagination-wrap" id="scripts-pagination"></div>

<script>
function scriptCardHtml(s) {
  return '<div class="book-card script-card">' +
    '<div class="script-ext-wrap">' +
      '<div class="script-ext">' + s.extension + '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div class="book-meta">' +
            '<span class="entry-date">Añadido: ' + s.fecha + '</span>' +
      '<div class="book-title">' + s.title + '</div>' +
      '<div class="script-byline">' +
        '<span class="book-author">' + s.author + '</span>' +
        '<span class="script-sep">·</span>' +
        '<span class="book-year">' + s.year + '</span>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<p class="book-caption">' + s.caption + '</p>' +
      '<div class="book-cite"><span class="cite-label">Cita este texto:</span> ' + s.citation + '</div>' +
      '<a href="' + s.download + '" class="download-btn" download>Descargar el script ↓</a>' +
    '</div>' +
  '</div>';
}

var ITEMS_PER_PAGE = 6;
var currentScriptPage = 1;
var activeScriptTag = null;

(function() {
  var allTags = [];
  SCRIPTS_DATA.forEach(function(s) {
    if (s.tags) s.tags.forEach(function(t) {
      if (allTags.indexOf(t) === -1) allTags.push(t);
    });
  });
  allTags.sort();
  var el = document.getElementById('scripts-tags');
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML =
    '<button class="tag-chip tag-chip--active" data-tag="" onclick="filterScripts(null)">ver todo</button>' +
    allTags.map(function(t) {
      return '<button class="tag-chip" data-tag="' + t + '" onclick="filterScripts(\'' + t + '\')">' + t + '</button>';
    }).join('');
})();

function renderScripts() {
  var data = activeScriptTag
    ? SCRIPTS_DATA.filter(function(s) { return s.tags && s.tags.indexOf(activeScriptTag) > -1; })
    : SCRIPTS_DATA;
  var totalPages = Math.ceil(data.length / ITEMS_PER_PAGE) || 1;
  if (currentScriptPage > totalPages) currentScriptPage = 1;
  var start = (currentScriptPage - 1) * ITEMS_PER_PAGE;
  document.getElementById('scripts-cards').innerHTML = data.slice(start, start + ITEMS_PER_PAGE).map(scriptCardHtml).join('');
  renderScriptsPagination(totalPages);
}

function renderScriptsPagination(totalPages) {
  var el = document.getElementById('scripts-pagination');
  if (!el) return;
  if (totalPages <= 1) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  el.innerHTML = Array.from({length: totalPages}, function(_, i) {
    var p = i + 1;
    return '<button class="page-btn' + (p === currentScriptPage ? ' page-btn--active' : '') +
      '" onclick="goToScriptPage(' + p + ')">' + p + '</button>';
  }).join('');
}

function goToScriptPage(p) {
  currentScriptPage = p;
  renderScripts();
  var el = document.getElementById('scripts-cards');
  if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}

function filterScripts(tag) {
  activeScriptTag = tag;
  currentScriptPage = 1;
  document.querySelectorAll('#scripts-tags .tag-chip').forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.classList.toggle('tag-chip--active', btn.dataset.tag === (tag || ''));
  });
  renderScripts();
}

renderScripts();
</script>
```
